<!--
This repository is a template that research groups fork. Pull requests should
improve the template itself (Quartz config, content scaffold, examples, docs) —
not add a particular group's content. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. What does the template do after this PR that it didn't before? -->

## Why?

<!-- The problem this solves, or a link to the issue it closes (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation (README, comments)
- [ ] Quartz configuration (`quartz.config.ts`, `quartz.layout.ts`)
- [ ] `content/` scaffold or worked examples
- [ ] Build workflow (`build.sh`)
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npx quartz build --serve` and the site compiles and serves
- [ ] Backlinks, graph view, and `[[wikilinks]]` still resolve (if I touched `content/`)
- [ ] One focused concern in this PR
- [ ] No group-specific content added to the template
